```dockerfile
# Fri, 24 Jan 2025 20:03:54 GMT
COPY /rootfs/ / # buildkit
# Fri, 24 Jan 2025 20:03:54 GMT
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
# Fri, 24 Jan 2025 20:03:54 GMT
ARG version=11.0.26.4-1
# Fri, 24 Jan 2025 20:03:54 GMT
